_comment: THE BOX for pizza-shop-ops. Hero tools have rich descriptions + additional_search_text and live in hero_tools/. oven.set_temp carries require_approval=always to show approval gating. The rest are name+description only so the box is honestly large.

tools.name: inventory.check_stock
tools.description: Check how much of an ingredient, topping, box, or SKU is left and where it is; use when someone asks do we have, are we out of, how much is left, or are we good on something.
tools.additional_search_text: stock count quantity remaining out of supply mozzarella cheese dough how much do we have low on

tools.name: oven.set_temp
tools.description: Set or change a pizza oven's target temperature and preheat it for a given style of pie; this is a guarded action that requires shift-lead approval before it fires.
tools.additional_search_text: oven temperature preheat fire up heat deck bake degrees neapolitan crank up turn on the oven

tools.name: orders.create
tools.description: Create a new food order with line items, table or ticket number, and priority; use when someone wants to place, ring in, fire, or start an order.
tools.additional_search_text: new order place ring in fire ticket table large pepperoni get it in start an order

tools.name: orders.status
tools.description: Check the status of an existing order or ticket by table or id; use for where is, is it ready, how long on an order.
tools.additional_search_text: order status where is ready how long ticket table check on the order

tools.name: kb.search_recipes
tools.description: Look up a recipe, dough formula, bake time, or prep step from the kitchen knowledge base; use for how do I make, what's the recipe, hydration, proof time questions.
tools.additional_search_text: recipe dough hydration proof bake time prep how to make ingredients formula neapolitan

tools.name: delivery.assign_driver
tools.description: Assign an available delivery driver to one or more outgoing orders and dispatch them on a route.
tools.additional_search_text: delivery driver dispatch send out route assign deliver take the orders out

tools.name: inventory.reorder
tools.description: Place a restock/reorder for a low ingredient.

tools.name: inventory.count_waste
tools.description: Log wasted or spoiled product.

tools.name: orders.cancel
tools.description: Cancel an existing order.

tools.name: orders.add_item
tools.description: Add an item to an open order.

tools.name: oven.read_temp
tools.description: Read a pizza oven's current temperature.

tools.name: oven.start_clean
tools.description: Start an oven self-clean cycle.

tools.name: kb.search_allergens
tools.description: Look up allergen info for a menu item.

tools.name: kb.search_safety
tools.description: Search food-safety and handling procedures.

tools.name: customers.lookup
tools.description: Look up a customer by name or phone.

tools.name: customers.add_loyalty
tools.description: Add loyalty points to a customer.

tools.name: billing.create_invoice
tools.description: Create an invoice for an order.

tools.name: billing.apply_discount
tools.description: Apply a discount code to a ticket.

tools.name: delivery.track
tools.description: Track a driver's live location.

tools.name: delivery.estimate_eta
tools.description: Estimate delivery ETA for an address.

tools.name: comms.notify_customer
tools.description: Text a customer about their order.

tools.name: comms.page_kitchen
tools.description: Page a message to the kitchen line.

tools.name: shifts.who_is_on
tools.description: List who is currently on shift.

tools.name: reports.daily_summary
tools.description: Generate the end-of-day sales summary.
